idea-plugin.name: SitePilot Plugin
idea-plugin.description: SitePilot Plugin for JetBrains IDEs - Automate deployment, testing, and content management for your projects. Integrates with SitePilot platform for seamless devops workflows, Tilda exports, and Playwright testing.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Initial release
  • Basic integration with SitePilot platform
  • Support for automated deployment
  • Tilda export functionality
  • Playwright test integration
